headline: Movable Ink Appoints Adam Stambleck as CEO
summary: Movable Ink, the leader in AI-powered personalization, today announced that Adam Stambleck has been appointed Chief Executive Officer. Founder Vivek Sharma will transition from CEO to Executive Chairman and remain a member of the company's board.

headline: US Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Futures Rise As Sticky Inflation Clouds Rate Cut Path
summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Monday, Mar, 16 2026 US stock futures are pointing higher this morning, with E-mini S&P 500 contracts up about 0.4% and Nasdaq futures ahead roughly 0.4% as well, as investors weigh stubborn inflation against still solid spending. The PCE price index, a key inflation gauge watched by the Federal Reserve, rose 0.3% in January and the core measure rose 0.4%, leaving annual inflation at 2.8%. This indicates that the cost of living is easing but still...

headline: Oil at $103, Adobe in Freefall, and a Market That Just Can't Catch a Break
summary: Wall Street closed out a brutal week on Friday, March 13, with oil prices near three-year highs, a CEO shock at Adobe, and fresh macroeconomic data painting an uncomfortable picture of slowing growth and stubborn inflation.
